summary: HR Position & Akord Features - All tests passed. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified via Playwright (Длъжност field, Месечно/Акорд pay types, auto-calculation, akord_note field, ImageCropDialog file validation).

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement suggested

seed_data_creation: Used existing employees due to user limit (20). Test employee 'AkordWorker' created by previous iterations with Akord pay type.
context_for_next_testing_agent: HR Position & Akord features fully implemented and tested. Key features: 1) Длъжност (position) field in create/edit dialogs with data-testid='position-input' and 'create-position', 2) Pay types: Месечно and Акорд (пазарлък) in dropdown, 3) When Акорд selected, monthly salary fields hidden, akord_note field shown (data-testid='akord-note-input'), 4) Auto-calculation for Monthly: salary/days=daily, daily/hours=hourly, 5) ImageCropDialog with file validation (JPG/PNG/WebP only) - outputs 300x300 JPEG, 6) Position shown in employee header and pay info bar. Backend endpoints: POST/PUT /api/employees accepts position and akord_note, PUT /api/employees/{id}/basic accepts avatar_url.

Backend: EmployeeProfileCreate accepts p.notes: POST /api/employees correctly stores position and akord_note in profile

Backend: PAY_TYPES now includes Monthly.notes: Akord pay type accepted and stored correctly, payroll-enums returns [Hourly, Daily, Monthly]

Frontend: Employee edit form has 'Длъжно.notes: Found input with data-testid='position-input' in edit form

Frontend: Pay type dropdown shows 'Месеч.notes: Both options visible in dropdown with data-testid='pay-type-select'

Frontend: When Акорд selected, monthly s.notes: monthly-salary-input hidden, akord-note-input visible for Akord employee

Frontend: When Месечно selected, auto-ca.notes: Formula displayed: 2850 EUR / 22 дни = 129.55 EUR/ден → 16.19 EUR/ч

Frontend: Position shown in Employee Det.notes: Position 'Майстор' displayed in header for AkordWorker

Frontend: Create employee dialog has Длъ.notes: Found input with data-testid='create-position' in create dialog

Frontend: ImageCropDialog component rend.notes: Component imported and wired up. Uses react-easy-crop with round cropShape, aspect=1, zoom slider. Outputs 300x300 JPEG.

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints using real backend
